homepage.heroDek: Rory McIlroy claims his second consecutive green jacket, holding off Scottie Scheffler with a masterful 12-under par performance.
homepage.scorecardLead: Rory dominated the par 5s on the back nine.
homepage.bestStretchNote: Holes 13-15 on Sunday secured his victory.
homepage.repeatHook: McIlroy is the fourth player in history to win back-to-back Masters.

repeatContext.introSummary: A historic title defense at Augusta National.
repeatContext.rarityDescription: Only the fourth player to repeat as champion.

roryRepeatComparison.how2026HeldUpUnderPressure: Zero bogeys over the final 27 holes.
roryRepeatComparison.overallRepeatVerdict: A surgical defense built on iron precision.
